title: Rounded Crisp Korean Cabbage Songpyeon
description: A savory and crisp Korean dish featuring cabbage leaves, perfect for a date night, made with a double-fry method similar to KFC, and is vegetarian-friendly, formed into songpyeon shapes.
instructions: Separate the cabbage leaves and blanch them in boiling water for 30 seconds to make them pliable.
Prepare the songpyeon mold or shape the cabbage leaves into half-moon shapes by hand.
In a large bowl, mix together the flour, cornstarch, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and ginger powder.
Gradually add the water to the bowl and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Dip each cabbage leaf into the batter, coating it evenly.

Double-fry the coated cabbage leaves by first frying them at 325 degrees for 2 minutes, then increasing the temperature to 375 degrees and frying for an additional 2 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Drain the fried cabbage songpyeon on paper towels to remove excess oil.
Serve the rounded crisp Korean cabbage songpyeon hot and enjoy.
